title: SFC Group is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: SFC Group is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!
